title: Spotify Beat Tiles
previewText: Tap the music tiles in rhythm, build a combo streak, and climb the leaderboard for a demo reward.
description: A music-themed playable ad where players tap falling beat tiles with timing accuracy.
gameBrief: Players tap four lanes as beat tiles fall toward the hit zone. Perfect timing builds a combo streak, Great hits keep the run alive, and misses reset combo.
instructions: Use A S D F, arrow keys, or tap/click the four lanes when tiles reach the glowing hit zone. Perfect and Great hits score points; misses reset combo.
targetAudience: Music listeners, Gen Z players, arcade players, and fans of quick rhythm challenges.
reward: Top 10 players get a free 1-month premium-style reward code in the demo.
securityNotes: Metadata only. No JavaScript, executable files, tracking pixels, or third-party network calls are included in this submission.
